hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.command // ""' | { read -r target; case "$target" in *pre-commit-config.yaml*) reason="Do not weaken or remove pre-commit hooks to make checks pass; fix the underlying code instead.";; *pyproject.toml*) reason="Do not add/remove dependencies or loosen tool config directly; use uv add and keep constraints intact.";; *mypy.ini*) reason="Do not loosen mypy strictness to dodge type errors; fix the code instead.";; *.claude/settings*.json*) reason="Claude must not modify its own permission scope.";; *) exit 0;; esac; jq -n --arg reason "$reason" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:$reason}}'; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.command // ""' | { read -r target; case "$target" in *.env*) reason=".env contains secrets/credentials and must never be read into context.";; *) exit 0;; esac; jq -n --arg reason "$reason" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:$reason}}'; }
